skills.name: Flame Missile
skills.description: Releases fire missiles, causing impact and explosion damage.
tips: Ignition + Impact Multiplier is the core burn build.
Collapse Explosion adds a gravity hole — pair with Traction Field for maximum pull.
Lightning Link at Star Tier 3 turns every missile into chain lightning.

skills.name: Beam
skills.description: Fires a piercing beam that deals sustained energy damage.
tips: Energy Boost (Lv.18) gives Beam DMG +60% per debuff — stack Slow + Paralyze + Vulnerable for massive output.
Convergence Trigger + Energy Detonation combo melts burning enemies.
Graviton Laser pulls enemies into the beam path for sustained damage.

skills.name: Distortion Field
skills.description: Deploys a circular deceleration force field that slows and disrupts enemies.
tips: Field Suppression gives up to +200% bonus DMG based on slowness — stack Stasis Field first.
Field Replication (Tier 3) doubles your Phantom Darts every time they enter the field.
Quick Cooldown + Field Support gives almost permanent field coverage.

skills.name: Lightning Bomb
skills.description: Fires lightning bombs that bounce between enemies, releasing electric matrix explosions.
tips: Bomb Extension (Tier 3): each bounce increases DMG +30% — more bounces = exponential damage.
Cooperative Beam fires a Focus Laser on every hit — combines two S-tier skills.
Electric Enhancement (+80% Electric DMG) benefits all electric skills, not just Lightning Bomb.

Lightning Teleportation sends enemies back — combine with Traction Field to keep resetting positions.

chipSockets.name: Database
chipSockets.description: Contains utility, kill-trigger effects, and powerful conditional mechanics.

stats.description: Guardian gains 10x Charge Points on kill
Flame Missile releases 3 Small Flame Missiles on kill
For every 20 enemies hit by Firewheel, explosion DMG equal to 200% of ATK
DMG +60% to enemies with HP above 70%
2% chance to deal 8x Crit DMG as additional DMG (except Elites and Bosses)
Penetration +2 for all skills with penetration
Crit DMG deals 6% of target's MAX HP as additional DMG (MAX: 3x Crit DMG)
Extend debuff duration on enemy by 40%
DMG +36% to enemies within close range of shield
Immune to the first 6 DMG, counterattack DMG of 50% ATK
DMG +100% when shield HP is below 30%
Traction Field releases 3 Small Chain Lightning when hitting paralyzed enemies

chipSockets.description: Boosts elemental damage types and debuff duration. Best for debuff-heavy builds.

Immune to all damage for 5s when shield HP below 25% for the first time
Deals 3% of target's MAX HP as additional DMG (MAX: 1.5x Crit DMG)
Every 10% HP lost will instantly release Thunder Core once
Mortar fires 1 extra shot, DMG Unchanged
Extend debuff duration on enemy by 40%
Immune to the first 6 DMG, counterattack DMG of 50% ATK

combos.name: Burn & Detonate
combos.description: Use Flame Missile to apply [Burn] stacks, then trigger Beam's Energy Detonation for massive Super Ignition Explosions.
combos.synergy: Energy Detonation (Beam Tier 3) detonates Burn-affected enemies for enormous AOE burst.
combos.playstyle: Apply Burn with Ignition on Flame Missile, then let Beam trigger explosions on every hit.
tips: Pick Ignition Amplification (+100% Burn DMG) to amplify detonation damage.
Equip chips with Fire DMG +% and Explosion DMG +% for maximum output.
Energy Overload doubles debuff duration — keeps Burn active longer.

combos.name: Gravity Swarm
combos.description: Pull all enemies into a tight cluster with Traction Field and Distortion Field, then obliterate them with Mortar's Gravity Bomb.
combos.synergy: Gravity Bomb pulls enemies to center AND deals +100% DMG — layered with Gravity Hole from Traction Field, enemies never escape.
combos.playstyle: Use fields to clump enemies, then drop Mortar for chain explosions.
tips: Stasis Field on Distortion Field slows enemies up to 90% for Field Suppression bonus.
Field Suppression gives up to +200% extra DMG based on slowness.
Collapse Explosion on Flame Missile adds another gravity hole to the cluster.

combos.name: Lightning Storm
combos.description: Combine Thunder Core's chain lightning with Lightning Bomb's bouncing electro matrix for full-screen electric saturation.
combos.synergy: Electric Enhancement (+80% Electric DMG) boosts both skills simultaneously. Chain Expansion lets each Thunder Core chain to 9 targets.
combos.playstyle: Spam both skills for constant chain lightning across the entire wave.
tips: Electro Interference paralysis + Chain Interference from Thunder Core locks enemies in place.
Equip Electric DMG chips on all sockets for massive multiplier.
Continuous Bomb chains Lightning Bomb indefinitely — great for long waves.

combos.name: Laser Web
combos.description: Focus Laser's Disruptive Field creates a Distortion Field on every hit, while Refraction Pull chains lasers through the field endlessly.
combos.synergy: Every laser hit spawns a Distortion Field — more fields = more slowed enemies = more targets for refracted lasers.
combos.playstyle: Fire Focus Laser into groups to rapidly spawn Distortion Fields and chain lasers.
tips: Extreme Focus increases damage cap to 400% — stay on one target for maximum DPS.
Matrix Resonance releases Electric Matrix on every hit for extra AOE.
Field Suppression gives +200% bonus DMG on slowed enemies — stack with Stasis Field.

combos.name: Dart Splitter
combos.description: Phantom Darts split and multiply every time they pass through a Distortion Field via Field Replication.
combos.synergy: Field Replication (Distortion Field Tier 3) duplicates Phantom Darts on entry — combine with splitting cards to flood the screen.
combos.playstyle: Place Distortion Fields strategically on enemy paths so every dart multiplies.
tips: Execution Penetration stacks penetration on kills — darts pierce more as the wave progresses.
Piercing Ricochet at Lv.18 adds both penetration and reflection for even more coverage.
Shell Crit Boost gives Crit Rate +30% — pair with Crit DMG chips for burst.

combos.name: Drone Swarm
combos.description: Lightning Bomb's Drone Mirage summons Echo Drones on every hit, while Matrix Drone evolves to Tier 3 for devastating power.
combos.synergy: Drone Mirage creates Echo Drones from Lightning Bombs — combined with Drone Evolution II/III, your entire army is max-level.
combos.playstyle: Let Lightning Bombs fill the field with Echo Drones while Matrix Drone levels up.
tips: Drone Retrieval stores returning drones — up to 5 spares always ready.
Raging Drone stacks DMG +30% per attack — bosses melt quickly.
Electroshock adds AoE on every drone attack for crowd control.

combos.name: Firewheel Inferno
combos.description: Mortar's Firewheel Summon spawns a Firewheel on every explosion hit, while Hold the Ground extends every wheel by 10 extra seconds.
combos.synergy: One Mortar shot into a group creates multiple Firewheels. Vortex Firewheel pulls enemies into each spinning wheel.
combos.playstyle: Drop Mortar into enemy clusters to spawn a field of persistent Firewheels.
tips: Smart Acceleration gives Firewheel +60% DMG and +30% speed — great base card.
Mini Firewheel generates 2 mini wheels every 3s for persistent coverage.
Firewheel Ignition adds Burn stacks for extra DoT damage.

combos.name: Debuff Sniper
combos.description: Stack Slow (Beam), Paralyze (Thunder Core), and Vulnerable on enemies to maximize Beam's Energy Boost (+60% per debuff, up to 300%).
combos.synergy: Energy Boost at Lv.18 gives +60% DMG for EACH debuff on an enemy. With Slow + Paralyze + Vulnerable = +180% (or 300% cap).
combos.playstyle: Apply as many different debuffs as possible, then fire Beam for massive scaling damage.
tips: Energy Overload doubles debuff duration — keep all debuffs active simultaneously.
Extend debuff duration chips amplify this synergy enormously.
Graviton Laser pulls debuffed enemies into the beam path.

statusEffects.name: Burn
statusEffects.description: Deals fire damage over time. Can be amplified by Ignition Amplification (+100% Burn DMG). Enemies with Burn explode on death (Death Ignition card).
sources: LiDAR chip: Flame Missile inflicts Burn for 3s

statusEffects.name: Slow
statusEffects.description: Reduces enemy movement speed. Stacks up to 90% slow with Stasis Field. Increases Distortion Field damage via Field Suppression (up to +200% bonus DMG).
sources: Processor chip: Thunder Core inflicts Slow

statusEffects.name: Paralyze
statusEffects.description: Stuns enemies, preventing movement and attacks. Paralyzed enemies trigger small Chain Lightning with Paralysis Chain. Life Erosion deals 3% MAX HP when paralyzing.

statusEffects.name: Disruption
statusEffects.description: Stackable debuff. Reaching MAX stacks triggers a high burst of damage (Disruption Burst). At Tier 3, Area Disruption deals extra DMG at max stacks.

statusEffects.name: Vulnerable
statusEffects.description: Increases damage taken by the enemy. Applied by Focus Laser's Laser Penetration and Beam's Vulnerable Beam (on Sweeping Beams).
sources: Traction Field chip: Vulnerable spreads to nearby enemies

statusEffects.name: Physical Vulnerable
statusEffects.description: Increases physical damage taken. Applied by Phantom Dart's Piercing Mark. Especially powerful when combined with Matrix Drone and Mortar.

statusEffects.name: Injured
statusEffects.description: Damage-over-time debuff applied to enemies. All Matrix Drone damage can inflict Injured via a LiDAR chip effect.
sources: LiDAR chip: Matrix Drone damage inflicts Injured for 4s
